action_items.title: Landmarks Preservation Commission Appeal: 2425 Durant, Landmark application #LMIN2024-0008
action_items.recommendation: Conduct a public hearing, and upon conclusion adopt a Resolution upholding the appeal and reversing the Landmarks Preservation Commission (LPC) decision to designate the subject property as a City Landmark.

action_items.title: Landmarks Preservation Commission Appeal: 2138 Kittredge, Landmark application #LMIN2024-0006
action_items.recommendation: Conduct a public hearing, and upon conclusion adopt a Resolution upholding the appeal and reversing the Landmarks Preservation Commission (LPC) decision to designate the subject property as a City Landmark.

action_items.title: Zoning Adjustment Board Appeal: 2655 Shattuck, Use Permit #ZP2024-0057
action_items.recommendation: Conduct a public hearing, and upon conclusion adopt a Resolution denying the appeal and affirming the Zoning Adjustment Board (ZAB) decision to approve Use Permit #ZP2024-0057 to demolish a one-story, 8,185-square-foot, non-residential building and construct an eight-story (85 feet), 84,399-square-foot mixed-use residential building containing 97 dwelling units (including ten Very Low-Income Density Bonus qualifying units), 2,117 square feet of ground-floor commercial space and 41 vehicle parkin
